article.title: Michigan politicians want to ban Chinese-badged cars from even visiting the US
article.summary: It's an election year, and that means politicians are putting in extra work to pander to special interest groups they think will help them cross the finish line. If you're looking to be elected in Michigan, there aren't many interests more special than the automotive industry, and a good way to get the industry on your side is by going after the thing it fears the most : China. Now, if a pair of lawmakers get their way, Chinese-badged vehicles wouldn't just be restricted from sale or import in the US, they'd also be banned from entering the country, even for a simple day trip from Canada or Mexico. Moves to protect the US auto industry are nothing new, and they're popular across party lines. Former President Biden added an additional 100 percent import tariff on all Chinese-made cars durin
article.title_zh: 密西根州政治人物欲禁止中國品牌汽車進入美國
article.summary_zh: 大選年促使政治人物加倍努力討好特殊利益團體，而汽車業是密西根州最重要的產業之一。

article.title: Taiwan weighs criminal ban on AI chip exports to all of China — stricter measures beyond blacklisted firms would make smuggling servers a crime
article.summary: Taiwan is considering far stricter export controls that would restrict AI chip sales to every customer in China.
article.title_zh: 台灣考慮對中國所有客戶實施AI晶片出口刑事禁令 — 超越黑名單企業的更嚴格措施將使伺服器走私成為犯罪
article.summary_zh: 台灣正考慮實施更嚴格的出口管制，限制向中國所有客戶銷售AI晶片。

article.title: Apple Expands Child Safety Tools as Social Media Bans Grow
article.summary: Apple Inc. is expanding tools for parents to protect children online, a move that comes as governments around the world are increasingly banning social media for young people.
article.title_zh: 蘋果在社交媒體禁令擴大之際擴展兒童安全工具
article.summary_zh: Apple Inc. 正在擴展家長保護兒童在線的工具，此舉正值世界各地政府越來越多地禁止年輕人使用社交媒體之際。

article.title: Banks Sell Out After Broadband Firms’ Land Grab Backfires
article.summary: Banks with exposure to heavily-indebted broadband providers are selling their loans to distressed debt funds at a discount, a sign of their increasing weariness with the cash-strapped sector.
article.title_zh: 寬帶公司土地收購失利後銀行拋售貸款
article.summary_zh: 對負債累累的寬帶運營商有敞口的銀行正在折扣價將其貸款出售給困境債務基金，這是他們對現金短缺行業日益厭倦的跡象。

article.title: Nvidia has a radical new AI-RAN plan – a 6G radio unit chip
article.summary: Having already pitched its GPUs for use in RAN compute's servers and appliances, Nvidia is working on an offer that would go directly into radios.
article.title_zh: Nvidia 推出激進的新 AI-RAN 方案 — 6G 無線電單元晶片
article.summary_zh: Nvidia 已針對 RAN 運算伺服器和應用設備推介其 GPU，現正開發可直接整合到無線電中的解決方案。

article.title: Demand for data center CPUs has surged, and AI agents are responsible – why the CPU to GPU ratio is more important than ever for hyperscalers
article.summary: The massive AI gold rush has a new bottleneck set in its sights, CPUs. But what's driving the demand? We interview industry experts to find out.
article.title_zh: 數據中心 CPU 需求激增，AI agents 是主要驅動力——CPU 與 GPU 比例對超大規模運營商比以往任何時候都更重要
article.summary_zh: AI 淘金熱出現了新的瓶頸——CPU。我們採訪了行業專家以了解需求增長的原因。

article.title: Amazon is offering a $324 Nvidia RTX 5060 GPU deal in a lightning sale, making it the cheapest model available — 1080p gaming on a budget
article.summary: Grab an RTX 5060 GPU deal while you still can. The $324 deal is selling out fast in Amazon's limited-time sale.
article.title_zh: Amazon 閃電銷售提供 324 美元 Nvidia RTX 5060 GPU 優惠，為現有最便宜型號——1080p 遊戲預算方案
article.summary_zh: 趁現在購買 RTX 5060 GPU，324 美元的優惠在 Amazon 限時販售中銷售迅速。

article.title: Inside Europe’s Chip Rethink: Why Fabs Weren’t Enough and Why Spain Matters
article.summary: Europe’s semiconductor strategy is undergoing a quiet but significant reversal. After years of focusing on manufacturing capacity and supply-chain resilience, a new industry blueprint argues that Europe
article.title_zh: 歐洲晶片戰略反思內幕：為什麼晶圓廠還不夠，以及西班牙為何至關重要
article.summary_zh: 歐洲半導體戰略正在進行一場隱而未現但重大的調整，多年來重點關注製造能力和供應鏈韌性後，新的產業藍圖主張歐洲應該...

article.title: Google Photos starts rolling out ‘Wardrobe,’ a digital version of your closet, just not for everyone
article.summary: Announced earlier this year, the new “Wardrobe” feature of Google Photos is starting to roll out, but only for paid subscribers and only on Android. more…
article.title_zh: Google Photos 開始推出「衣櫃」功能，數位衣櫃版本，但並非所有用戶可用
article.summary_zh: Google Photos 的新「衣櫃」功能開始推出，但僅限付費訂閱用戶且僅在 Android 上提供。

article.title: ChatGPT reportedly prepares major redesign focused on agents as ‘chat is dead’
article.summary: A new report reveals that OpenAI is planning a major redesign to ChatGPT that focuses on AI agents and coding, rather than its roots as a chatbot. more…
article.title_zh: ChatGPT 據報準備重大重設計，聚焦於代理「聊天已過時」
article.summary_zh: OpenAI 據報計劃對 ChatGPT 進行重大重設計，聚焦於人工智慧代理和編程，而非聊天機器人的根源。

article.title: The UK Is Betting on a Billion-Dollar AI Supercomputer to Kick Its Addiction to US Tech
article.summary: The British government thinks a state-backed infrastructure initiative will help supercharge homegrown chip startups.
article.title_zh: 英國押注 10 億美元 AI 超級計算機以擺脫對美國技術的依賴
article.summary_zh: 英國政府認為官方支持的基礎設施舉措將幫助國內芯片初創公司加速發展。

article.title: China Preps $295 Billion Plan to Fund AI Buildout
article.summary: China is planning to spend around 2 trillion yuan ($295 billion) over the next five years to build data centers across the country. Neil Campling reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)
article.title_zh: 中國準備2,950億美元計劃資助AI建設
article.summary_zh: 中國計劃在未來五年投入約2兆元人民幣（2,950億美元）在全國建設數據中心。

article.title: China Preps $295 Billion Plan to Fund Nationwide AI Buildout
article.summary: China is preparing to spend around 2 trillion yuan ($295 billion) over the next five years on building data centers across the country, fueling Beijing’s ambition to propel the domestic AI sector and surpass the US in a potentially game-changing technology.
article.title_zh: 中國準備2,950億美元計劃資助全國AI建設
article.summary_zh: 中國準備在未來五年投入約2兆元人民幣（2,950億美元）建設全國數據中心，以推動國內AI發展並在此潛在改變遊戲規則的技術上超越美國。

article.title: Travlfi JourneyGo 5G mobile hotspot review – Affordably priced, but lacking in performance and features
article.summary: The Travlfi JourneyGo 5G makes a good first impression with its $299 price and lightweight design, but that shine wears off quickly.
article.title_zh: Travlfi JourneyGo 5G 行動熱點評測——價格經濟實惠，但性能和功能不足
article.summary_zh: Travlfi JourneyGo 5G 以 299 美元的價格和輕量化設計給人留下良好第一印象，但這種光彩很快就褪去。
